scaling_sensitive_components.reason: API handles HTTP traffic - consider horizontal scaling and load balancing
Worker processes - can scale horizontally for throughput
Database requires persistent storage and careful scaling strategy
Cache service - consider Redis Cluster or Sentinel for HA

scaling_guidance.worker_scaling: Workers can scale independently from API - consider HPA based on queue depth
scaling_guidance.stateful_services: Stateful services require careful HA setup - consider managed databases
scaling_guidance.external_integrations: External services: whatsapp_api, payment_gateway, Whatsapp, Stripe, Sendgrid
